title: screenview
description: Custom screen view event fired on every screen navigation. Contains both screen name and screen class. **Always use this event for analysis** — disregard the automatic `screen_view` event fired by Firebase.

ScreenName.description: The internal name of the screen. See the screen reference table below for known values.

ScreenClass.description: The screen class. Typically matches ScreenName, with the exception of `videos-detail` where ScreenClass is `videos-details`.

CountryID.description: The country context of the current screen.

PageCity.description: The city associated with the currently displayed weather location.

PageCountry.description: The country associated with the currently displayed weather location.

PageId.description: The unique identifier for the displayed weather location page.

ScreenTitle.description: The human-readable title of the screen, typically including location path.
